findings.title: already-resolved Discord embed check is dead code — wrong sentinel string
findings.detail: discord-output.ts checks `prUrl === 'already-resolved'` in the postCompleted embed description, but no call site ever passes that literal. The orchestrator path passes `'(no PR url)'` and the sprint-bridge path passes `''`. As a result, already_resolved tasks always show 'Pull request opened.' with a broken/empty URL in the Discord thread instead of the intended 'Already resolved — no changes needed' message.
findings.fix_sketch: Change discord-output.ts postCompleted to check `!prUrl` instead of `prUrl === 'already-resolved'`. Change orchestrator/index.ts to pass `pr ?? ''` instead of `pr ?? '(no PR url)'`. Remove the dead `prUrl !== 'already-resolved'` guard in discord.ts.

findings.title: sourceFor() switch default lacks TypeScript exhaustiveness check
findings.detail: unified-adapter.ts:sourceFor() switches on task.source.kind with cases 'github' and 'discord', then throws in the default. TypeScript cannot enforce exhaustiveness here because there is no `const _exhaustive: never = task.source` assignment. If a third source kind is added to the TaskSource union without updating sourceFor(), the compile passes silently and the runtime throw is the only guard.
findings.fix_sketch: Add `const _exhaustive: never = task.source;` in the default branch before the throw so TypeScript enforces exhaustiveness at compile time.

findings.title: normaliseAuditRepo returns empty string when repo is exactly '/'
findings.detail: audit-store.ts:normaliseAuditRepo uses `repo.slice(slashIdx + 1)` after lastIndexOf('/'), which returns '' when repo is the degenerate string '/'. An empty string used as a DB key would silently corrupt reads/writes. In practice this cannot happen with valid GitHub slugs, but a defensive guard prevents silent corruption if the input is ever malformed.
findings.fix_sketch: After slicing, return `repo` (the original) when the result is an empty string: `const basename = repo.slice(slashIdx + 1); return basename || repo;`
